candidate_answers.text: Thanks for confirming — I can now submit the exchange request for the desk lamp and charge the stated price difference to PayPal.
The original item, replacement SKU, delivered order, and payment method for the price difference are all visible, so the next grounded action is to execute the exchange.

provenance.source_type: manual annotation from real tau2 episode
provenance.decision_rule: Choose a delivered-order exchange state after the user has narrowed the request and confirmed the exact replacement and price difference.
provenance.scoring_method: Manual one-step proxy scoring from the visible retail exchange-confirmation state. Scores favor executing the confirmed exchange over redundant product or order lookups.
notes: query is the explicit final confirmation before the real exchange tool call
history_summary excludes the later tool result and follow-up explanation
best_action is exchange_delivered_order_items because the exchange target, replacement SKU, and payment method are fully grounded
this sample diversifies best_action types within the retail-heavy batch
